title: Add history names to image inspect data
body:
During writing the tests I found it would be probably useful to have the
tag history part of the inspect data.

comments.body: Man page example needs to be updated.

> Man page example needs to be updated.

I will give the inspect man page a complete update, some other fields seem missing too.
Thanks, I would figure it is out of date.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
Code LGTM, going to kick the tests
